title: Translations of ASAPbio preprint infographics
author: Puebla, Iratxe
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Translations to Spanish, French, Portuguese, Italian and Polish for the ASAPbio preprints infographics, which outline information about what preprints are, their benefits, trends in preprint use in the life sciences, and how preprints fit in the publication process. The original infographics in English are available in the records below: 

 Dorrego-Rivas, Ana, Iwema, Carrie, Pimentel, Mafalda, & Puebla, Iratxe. (2021). ASAPbio preprint infographics. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5592318 

 Singh, Sumeet Pal, Ferguson, Christine, Ahmad, Umar, & Puebla, Iratxe. (2021). ASAPbio Preprint infographics: post your preprint in 5 steps, publishing process, take action in support of preprints. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5724096
steps_raw:

keywords: Preprints, ASAPbio, preprint servers, bioRxiv, journals, journal clubs, publication, scooping
